chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.D-43 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 7075/19 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 7076/19 4. For hearing main case. 30.08.2019. Mr. Raja Jawad Ali Sahar advocate for applicants alongwith applicants. 1&3. Granted. 2. Overruled. 4. It is, inter alia, contended that the applicants are innocent and have been falsely implicated in the present case at the instance of SSP Jamshoro on a land dispute with Awan community whose Mills are situated in Kotri, District Jamshoro; that the applicants intend to surrender before the Anti- Terrorism Court, Hyderabad for seeking relief as contemplated u/s 498, Cr.P.C but are apprehending their arrest at the hands of police, who are acting malafidely against the applicants at the instance of SSP Jamshoro. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants are granted protective bail for a period of seven days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/ each and P.R Bond in the same amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of seven days on 05.09.2019 or on surrender of the applicants before the relevant Court, whichever is earlier. The bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
